---
title: "Henrietta Darley Guinness"
---

## Henrietta Darley Guinness

**Dates:** (1886/7-after 1952)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. Robert Guinness and Grace Harriet Butler

### Biography

[LG 1952 Guinness of Wootton Hall, <i>Guinness Family</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from April 2 [1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
